description: HealthCare.gov is the U.S. federal health insurance marketplace website, providing consumer information about coverage, eligibility, and enrollment. Related CMS developer properties also expose plan, provider, and coverage data used by HealthCare.gov and public healthcare datasets.
summary: healthcare.gov exposes three public developer-facing HTTP APIs: the public HealthCare.gov Content API, the CMS Marketplace API at marketplace.api.healthcare.gov/api/v1 (API key required), and the public data.healthcare.gov Open Data API; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
